commit_scope: Loosen the geometry projection rule in trace-symbol-spaces.form (new tightness + gap_closure_recipe in Part 6) and record four parallel real-data threads on the live 02:56:35 efficacy-probe vectors: (1) detailed band contributions for all name-the-need high-angle relationships, (2) audio and hindu-tattva projections on the observer/name-the-need/ho_oponopono thruline, (3) full scan of other name-the-need time windows (only 3 total events), (4) first working mag8/dot8 implementation attempts toward executable geometry projection. All grounded in the exact live sense_after.spectrum vectors and the existing .form declarations.
evidence_refs: New tightness added: geometry-projection-rule-still-declarative with evidence from the 71.1°/74.1° pair and kernel vector math limits
New gap_closure_recipe: make-geometry-projection-executable with done_when tied to re-deriving the full pairwise table inside Form
Full pairwise angle table + differentiation signal (angle × ratio) on the five live vectors, highest 87.3° observer ↔ name-the-need
Thru-line analysis: 155.4° opposing change vectors between (name-the-need - observer) and (ho_oponopono - name-the-need); band 3 clarity spike + almost complete release
Detailed band contributions: band 3/4 clarity is the dominant driver in every high-angle separation involving name-the-need
Audio projection (EQ gains): name-the-need shows extreme clarity motif (bands 3-4); ho_oponopono more distributed warmth-relation shape
Hindu-tattva projection: observer = quiet witness-space; name-the-need = strong clarity-expression thrust; ho_oponopono = warmth-relation carrying integration
Full trace scan: only 3 name-the-need strategy_fired events total in the file (two strong magnitude 0.419); limited recurrence data

Executable projection progress: explicit 8D mag8 + dot8 defined and parsing in the kernel using only demonstrated primitives; numeric evaluation on live vectors still limited (closure objects returned) — recorded as diagnostic for the gap closure
worktree_pr_guard reports (multiple): only commit-evidence-guard failing; all other sub-guards (rebase, workflow, bml-bmf, spec-quality) clean
